electives.

5 Must come from a list of courses approved for EE electives. At least 3 credits must come from Category A; at least 2 credits must from Category B; and at least 3 credits must come from Category C. Up to 7 credits can come from approved non-ENEE courses that are appropriate for the area of interest chosen by the student. Non-ENEE courses may not be used to fulﬁll the Category B or C requirements.
